---
title: "Title TBD"
---

## Overview

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under Construction

## Learning Objectives

{{< fa screwdriver-wrench >}} TBD

## Preparation

{{< fa screwdriver-wrench >}} TBD




{{< include topics/group-process-design.qmd >}}
{{< include activities/design-process-p01.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/thinking-tools.qmd >}}
{{< include activities/design-process-p02.qmd >}}




{{< include topics/code-conditionals.qmd >}}
{{< include activities/write-conditional.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/code-split-columns.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/code-joins.qmd >}}
{{< include activities/write-join.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/code-shape.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/code-loops.qmd >}}
